name: Oven-Roasted Beef Au Jus
recipeIngredient: 1 beef blade or round bone chuck roast, cut 2 inches thick (3 to 5 lbs)
1 beef bouillon cube dissolved in 1 cup boiling water
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the surface of the roast with salt and pepper.
2. Place the roast on a rack in a shallow pan.
3. Insert a meat thermometer into the center of the thickest portion.
4. Roast in an oven set to 325°F for about 2 - 2 1/2 hours, or until the meat thermometer reaches 160°F for medium doneness.
5. Remove the roast to a warm platter.
6. Serve with hot seasoned juices from the pan.
AU JUS:
1. Add a small amount of hot water and stir the brown bits from the pan and rack into the drippings.
2. Measure the drippings. If needed, add more liquid to bring the total to 2 cups.
3. Pour the mixture back into the roasting pan.
4. Blend in the herbs and mushrooms.
5. Simmer for 5 minutes.
